title: presence_status_set: extract nullable-field-to-JSON helper
description: misc.rs lines 99-125 repeat the same Option<Option<T>>->serde_json::Value pattern three times (status_text, status_emoji, expires_at). Each block is 4 lines of map.insert + .map(...).unwrap_or(Null). A small inline closure or a two-line helper fn opt_opt_to_value<T: Into<Value>>(v: Option<Option<T>>) -> Option<Value> would collapse all three blocks to three one-liners and make adding future nullable fields trivial.
close_reason: decision: nullable-field-to-JSON is straightforward enough (6 if-let arms) that a helper would add indirection without clarity; keep inline
